title: Section 11
content: 1[11. Teaching in the University.--All recognised teaching for the purpose of University degrees, diplomas and certificates shall be conducted 2[under the supervision of the Academic Council and in accordance with the Statutes and Ordinances].]
footnote: 1. Subs. by Act 62 of 1951, s. 7, for section 11. 2. Subs. by Act 34 of 1972, s. 7, for certain words (w.e.f. 17-6-1972).
